content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: 2504cf9a-892
Subtask ID: 50b6e621
Priority: 1

Task: Audit the current OpenClaw Army system implementation. Analyze: 1) The current function/tool definitions (delegate_to_alpha, delegate_to_beta, delegate_to_gamma) — examine parameters, error handling, and efficiency, 2) The system prompt/instructions structure for the Meta-Orchestrator and managers, 3) Identify technical debt, missing capabilities, or architectural limitations, 4) Security considerations in the delegation chain, 5) Scalability bottlenecks. Provide specific code-level findings and recommended improvements with implementation details.
